summary: Tested Proposal Versioning feature - Backend APIs (100% pass) and Frontend UI (100% pass). All versioning endpoints work correctly: save version with note, get versions list, restore as new proposal. Frontend VersionHistoryPanel renders correctly in TripBuilder sidebar when editing, with Save as Version button, version note input, expandable version history list, and Restore as New Proposal functionality.

issues: Hotel address shows 'undefined, undefined' - minor display issue (pre-existing from iteration_33)

seed_data_creation: Created test versions via API and UI during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Proposal Versioning feature is fully functional. Backend has 3 new endpoints in /app/backend/routes/proposals.py (lines 122-186): POST /api/proposals/{id}/versions, GET /api/proposals/{id}/versions, POST /api/proposals/{id}/versions/{version_id}/restore. Frontend VersionHistoryPanel component at /app/frontend/src/components/TripBuilder/VersionHistoryPanel.jsx is integrated in TripBuilder.jsx sidebar (lines 1910-1924) and only shows when data.isEditing && data.editProposalId. Test proposal ID: bf0328bb-2c14-4cc6-9937-3f7dc0918750 has 5+ versions.

backend_api.GET /api/proposals/{id}/versions: PASSED - returns versions list sorted by version_number descending
backend_api.POST /api/proposals/{id}/versions with n: PASSED - creates version with note, returns version doc

backend_api.Version number auto-increment: PASSED - v1, v2, v3... correctly incremented
backend_api.POST /api/proposals/{id}/versions/{versi: PASSED - creates new proposal with '(Restored vN)' suffix

frontend_ui.expand_version_history: PASSED - version list expands with items
frontend_ui.click_restore_creates_new_proposal: PASSED - new proposal created and navigated to view page

mocked_apis_note: Google Sheets sync, Stripe & PayPal payments are MOCKED as per original spec
